_comment: Bloomberg Commodity Index (BCOM) target weights used by CMOP/COMM/COMX benchmark ETCs. Update annually when Bloomberg publishes new target weights (typically October). Source: https://www.bloomberg.com/company/press/bloomberg-commodity-index-XXXX-target-weights-announced/

precious_metals._comment: Overlap % of each metal in BCOM. Used to deprioritise PM ETCs that duplicate commodity allocation. Platinum and palladium are NOT in BCOM — they add fully new exposure. Gold hits the 15% individual cap.
